audit_items.proof_trace: The while loop at line 50 terminates only when HashSet size equals custody_group_count. However, all inserted elements are bounded by mod NUMBER_OF_CUSTODY_GROUPS (line 58-59), so the set saturates at 128 elements. When peer-reported custody_group_count > 128, the loop condition can never be satisfied, causing an infinite loop.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Malicious peer advertises custody_group_count = 2^32 via P2P metadata. When victim calls checkPeerCustody or matchIntersection during data column sync, handle_custody_groups enters infinite loop, freezing the requesting thread and causing DoS.
